queries.question: Provide a list of takeaway meal descriptions with any best before date as well as prepared meal descriptions with a best before date of 10.11.2018.
queries.sql:
SELECT Meals.Description 
FROM Meals
WHERE Meals.MealType = "Prepared Meal" OR Meals.MealType = "Takeaway" AND Meals.BestBefore = "10.11.2018"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?description WHERE {
  ?meals a :Meals .
  ?meals p:Description ?description .
  ?meals p:MealType ?mealtype_w .
  ?meals p:MealType ?mealtype_w2 .
  ?meals p:BestBefore ?bestbefore_w .
  FILTER((STR(?mealtype_w) = "Prepared Meal" || (STR(?mealtype_w2) = "Takeaway" && STR(?bestbefore_w) = "10.11.2018")))
}

queries.question: Which takeaway meal descriptions have a best before date of 10.11.2018 and which prepared meal descriptions have the same best before date?
queries.sql:
SELECT Meals.Description 
FROM Meals
WHERE (Meals.MealType = "Prepared Meal" OR Meals.MealType = "Takeaway") AND Meals.BestBefore = "10.11.2018"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?description WHERE {
  ?meals a :Meals .
  ?meals p:Description ?description .
  ?meals p:MealType ?mealtype_w .
  ?meals p:MealType ?mealtype_w2 .
  ?meals p:BestBefore ?bestbefore_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?mealtype_w) = "Prepared Meal" || STR(?mealtype_w2) = "Takeaway")) && STR(?bestbefore_w) = "10.11.2018"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show takeaway descriptions and prepared meal descriptions with a best before date of 10.11.2018.
